target: OBE confirmations: 7 orphan ISSs confirmed already resolved in current codebase (CSS prefixes, tests, visual order, Domain 11 attribution)

obe_resolutions.reason: Verified: HTML uses ds-falsifiability-module, ds-fm-heading, ds-fm-caption, ds-fm-jump, ds-fm-row, ds-fm-condition, ds-fm-desc, ds-fm-status, ds-fm-status-num, ds-fm-status-sub — all carry ds- prefix. test.js confirms old unprefixed class is gone: assert(!htmlContent.includes('class="falsifiability-module"'), ...). No patch needed.

Verified: grep for model’s returns zero hits; grep for model's returns 5 hits (all ASCII apostrophe). The apostrophe inconsistency EXP-257 introduced has been corrected to ASCII throughout. No patch needed.

Verified: test.js contains presence and position tests for ds-thesis-hero. grep 'thesis-hero' test.js returns 4 matches including: assert for presence, visual-order position test (thesisPos < barPos), and combined assert that all three (ds-thesis-hero, ds-verdict-bars, ds-falsifiability-module) are present. No patch needed.

Verified: test.js has EXP-271 test block with at least 6 assertions covering ds-falsifiability-module: (1) class present, (2) CSS rule present, (3) legacy unprefixed class absent, (4) exactly 4 ds-fm-row elements, (5) ds-fm-jump anchor to #eg-falsifiability, (6) no standalone 'pending' status-num. grep 'EXP-256\|EXP-271' in test.js returns 24 matches. No patch needed.

Verified: test.js explicitly tests visual order with: assert(thesisPos < barPos, 'ds-thesis-hero must appear BEFORE ds-verdict-bars') and assert(barPos < modPos, 'ds-verdict-bars must appear BEFORE ds-falsifiability-module'). If order were wrong, tests would fail on every build. The order constraint from HNOTE-OPERATOR-DESIGN-REVIEW-V2 is enforced by tests. No patch needed.
Verified: grep for 'Domain 11' in docs/index.html returns zero hits. The ±3 nT rule attribution no longer references 'Domain 11'. The EXP-267 rewrite removed this attribution. No patch needed.
Verified: same as ISS-1703 — 'Domain 11' does not appear anywhere in docs/index.html. The c3 H1 concern (integrated text attributes ±3 nT rule to Domain 11) is resolved. No patch needed.

tldr_evidence: All 7 ISSs verified against current docs/index.html and test.js. CSS prefix conventions already applied (ISS-1584). Apostrophe inconsistency already corrected (ISS-1611). Thesis-hero tests already in place covering presence and visual order (ISS-1648, ISS-1654, ISS-1657). Domain 11 attribution entirely absent from HTML (ISS-1703, ISS-1733).
tldr_verdict: All 7 ISSs are OBE — no patches required.
